name: Slide_Mech

infobox.Systems: Area Shift(Science)EffectPush self and all adjacent tiles.Upgrade IShield self ()Shield the user when activated.Upgrade IIShield Ally ()Shield any Ally units affected by this skill.

sections.Team: The mech is available as part of theArachnophilessquad.
sections.Strategy:
When playing theArachnophiles, the Slide Mech is your only reliable displacement option; its primary goal is reducing the amount of threats to the grid. That can be done by enabling good ricochets for theBulk Mech, pushing enemies into deadly threats likeChasmsorWatertiles, bumping them into each other to allow theArachnoid Mechto finish them off, or simply moving targets around so they attack something else.
Area Shift works like a restrictedWind Torrent; it allows you to shift up to 7 targets (push up to 4 + bump up to 7), not including the Slide Mech itself. This can be extremely useful in missions with high Vek population by spreading bump damage. If looking to take advantage of bump damage, consider raising the Slide Mech's HP and powering theShield Selfupgrade, as its starting 2 HP makes it very frail otherwise. Similarly, the Shield upgrade helps in dealing with melee range Vek, which can otherwise still target the Slide Mech when shifted. A particularly powerful combination is Area Shift withForce Amp; the latter will increase all bump damage by 1, and can let the Slide Mech deal a lot of damage with just Area Shift.
In general, the Shield Self upgrade for Area Shift is one of the best choices during the early-game, as it only costs 1 core while letting the Slide Mech tank any Alpha Vek attack and stay online. It is also invaluable for blocking Vek spawns as you can easily renegerate the shield by simply shifting onto aSpawn Tile. TheShield Allyupgrade is a beneficial later upgrade to allow the squad more blocking and tanking potential, or if playing with theIce Generatorto keep the whole squad free of being frozen. However, unlike thePulse MechsRepulse upgrade, note that it does not grant shields to adjacent buildings.
Despite its high utility potential, the Slide Mech is highly constrained by its grounded movement range, so it will definitely benefit from an alternative weapon, especially one that can target any point on the battlefield. Pilots that grant movement utility are great for this mech as well, such asArchimedes; once you gain Shield Self, you can shift up to 4 tiles and tank an attack or block a spawn.Prosperois another great choice, as it enables you to shift enemy units into deadly threat tiles with much more flexibility.
